scripts.check: npm run check --prefix client && npm run check --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.verify: npm run check --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix client && npm run check --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix client && npm run dev --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
